overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a cowboy hat and leather coat walking through a historic New Orleans-style city at night. The scene features gas-lit cobblestone streets, covered sidewalks with wrought iron railings, flowering cherry blossom trees, and period-dressed NPCs, with light rain beginning to fall midway through the clip.

large white building with classical columns and lit windows
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a covered cobblestone sidewalk at night, passing a home goods store with painted signage. Flowering trees with pink blossoms line the right side of the street, while a grand columned mansion is visible ahead in the distance, illuminated by warm gas lamps.

windows with closed shutters and curtains visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the covered porch of the columned mansion, passing a wrought iron bench and shuttered windows. A couple in period clothing stands conversing at the corner ahead as the character approaches the end of the building.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long covered arcade as light rain begins to fall outside, visible in the glow of street lamps. A vertical 'THEATRE' sign is visible in the distance on the left, while the character passes a woman in a purple dress standing against the wall.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the covered arcade, passing two men in conversation on the right. A large tree becomes visible at the corner ahead as the walkway opens up, with a stone railing now visible on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gas-lit historic city at night, transitioning from a residential street into a rainy commercial arcade. It begins with the character walking along a covered cobblestone sidewalk past a home goods store and pink flowering trees, moving toward a grand columned mansion illuminated by warm lamps. As the character reaches the mansion, the camera glides along its covered porch past wrought iron benches and shuttered windows before approaching a conversing couple at the corner. The scene then shifts into a long covered arcade as a light rain begins to fall in the glow of the street lamps, passing a woman in a purple dress and a distant vertical theatre sign. Finally, the walkway opens up past two men in conversation, revealing a large tree and a stone railing as the character reaches the end of the arcade.
